change_summary: Synthetic renderer specimen for the newly admitted nitpick severity.

findings.body: This is optional polish, not a wound worth cauterizing. The schema now preserves nitpick findings rather than mutating them into medium severity.
findings.fix_hint: Keep the nitpick severity intact and sort it after stronger findings.
findings.title: Nitpick severity survives validation

what_i_checked: Validated that the renderer accepts nitpick as a first-class severity.
